response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable, broadly experienced full-stack engineer with roughly 20 years of hands-on technical work across web, mobile, embedded, and recently AI-adjacent infrastructure. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role demands Director-level individual contributor impact, recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products at scale, and a strategic advisory posture — none of which are evidenced in the resume. His AI involvement is limited to recent, contributing-level work on MCP tooling at re:cinq, and his overall career trajectory reflects deep technical execution rather than technical strategy, thought leadership, or executive-level influence.
strengths: ~20 years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded systems, and cloud stacks demonstrates strong technical adaptability
Founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial initiative and long-term ownership of an open-source platform
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq indicates growing engagement with AI infrastructure
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no demonstrated AI research background or recognized AI product leadership
Career history reflects Staff/Senior individual contributor roles, not Director-level IC scope, strategic advisory work, or influence over organizational AI direction
AI expertise is nascent and narrowly scoped — no demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms built at meaningful scale
